summary: Plan-only remediation review for five open PRs: no merge recommendation is safe from this artifact because none includes a complete merge preflight with clean /review evidence. Four PRs stay open on non-mutating paths, one overlapping Workboard PR stays related because its stronger canonical sibling is not hydrated in this run, and the explicitly flagged security-sensitive linked PR is quarantined only at the item level.

actions.reason: Keep open as a standalone maintainer-review PR. Merge is not recommended from this run because the artifact does not contain the required complete merge_preflight or a clean passed /review record, but there is no concrete fix artifact to build.

Keep open on the existing PR path. The artifact supports this as the current fix candidate for #90404, but it does not provide the complete merge preflight needed for a merge recommendation and does not contain a bounded repair plan beyond maintainer review.

Keep open as the current non-security fix path for #91171. The linked security-sensitive sibling does not block this ordinary bug path, but the artifact still falls short of the complete merge_preflight required for a merge recommendation.

Keep open as an independently reviewable candidate PR. Because the canonical issue and sibling candidates are not hydrated in this shard, the worker should not emit fixed-by-candidate or superseded close logic here, and the artifact still lacks merge-preflight proof for merge_candidate.
Keep as related only. The overlapping canonical PR path referenced in comments is not hydrated, so the worker should not recommend merge or close actions against #95468 from this artifact alone.
Quarantine the exact flagged item to central security handling and keep all other non-security PR classifications moving.
